overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city environment, featuring a detailed holographic pillar with animated dragon graphics, transitioning from wet streets to covered walkways and bustling neon-lit plazas. The footage appears to be from a high-quality video game engine with cinematic lighting and wet surface reflections.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet city street at dusk, approaching a prominent holographic pillar displaying a cyan dragon animation. The street features modern glass towers on the left and neon storefronts on the right, with light traffic visible on the road.

segments.scene_description: Circling the Yagami Market holographic pillar in a small plaza, observing the cyan dragon animation from all sides. The surrounding area features digital billboards and futuristic storefronts, with the wet pavement reflecting the vibrant neon lights.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian underpass beneath an elevated highway, illuminated by striking purple neon light strips overhead. The concrete structure creates a sheltered corridor with support columns lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with mixed pedestrian traffic and multi-level storefronts with Asian signage

passing through denser crowd of pedestrians near brightly lit storefronts with Asian characters

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a bustling urban plaza filled with pedestrians and lined with multi-level storefronts featuring bright Asian neon signage. The area transitions from the covered underpass to an open pedestrian zone with various commercial establishments and architectural details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a cyberpunk city, moving from a rain-slicked street toward a vibrant, crowded commercial plaza. It begins by gliding along a wet road at dusk, passing glass towers and neon storefronts as it approaches a prominent holographic pillar featuring a cyan dragon animation. The camera then circles this glowing pillar within a small plaza, capturing the vibrant reflections of digital billboards on the damp pavement before turning away to enter a sheltered pedestrian underpass. As the scene shifts into this concrete corridor, the lighting transforms into striking purple neon strips overhead, guiding the movement beneath an elevated highway. Finally, the path opens up from the underpass into a bustling urban plaza filled with pedestrians and multi-level storefronts adorned with bright Asian neon signage.
